name: BATTALION OIL CORP
summary: PART I Overview Unless the context otherwise requires, all references in this report to Battalion,, the Company, our, us, and we refer to Battalion Oil Corporation and its subsidiaries, as a common entity. Battalion is the successor reporting company to Halcn Resources Corporation (Halcn).
